items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for incentive integration.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the incentive integration feature, specifically the ability to complete a survey for a discount. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or endpoints that confirm the existence or functionality of this incentive integration. Therefore, it is not possible to determine if the requirement is satisfied or if there is a gap in the implementation.
